title: Section 6
content: The officers specified in terms (c), (f) and (g) of section 4 shall have power to take cognizance of all matters connected with the survey of land and the settlement of revenue rates and the preparation and maintenance of land records and other registers and shall exercise all such powers and perform all such powers and perform all such duties as may be prescribed by any general or special order of the Administrator published in the Official Gazette.
